prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CDEPPS-7PC-STD-BLU-KPKO Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 7pc Pretend Play Doctor Kit for Boys with Stethoscope, Storage Bin, Boys Ages 3-8, Blue Description: Booking is now open. Your little nurse or doctor in training now has a prescription for fun pretend play to help friends, family, dolls and stuffed animals feel their best. The nurse or doctor kit for kids is available in either pink or blue, and includes a handy locking doctor's briefcase with handle to keep all the playset components together and neatly stowed away when not in use. A great toy for travel, as the storage bin snaps closed to keep everything secure when stowed away.

The doctor or nurses kit includes all the medical pretend play tools kids and young children will need, including a stethoscope, a needle or syringe, glasses, a sample dish, a timer and carrying suitcase little ones can use to pack all their supplies to go-- fixing pretend play scrapes and scratches has never been more fun.

The Kidplokio complete doctor kit for kids enhances young children's understanding of compassion towards friends and family; the medical kit inspires the imagination, pretend play and cosplay, giving kids lots of opportunities for social interaction, fine motor skills development, dexterity and of course, growing and learning.

Let the appointments commence.

Recommended Ages: 3+

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: toys for boys medical Christmas gifts hanukkah gifts learning and education toys stem toys fine motor toys travel games kids children toddlers sibling gifts brother gifts nurse baby development toys cosplay roleplay games medicine bag Features: - PRETEND PLAY DOCTOR KIT FOR KIDS: Little ones now have a prescription for doctor or nurse pretend play fun! Toddlers and young children will love treating and taking care of friends, family, stuffed animals, dolls are more with this complete doctor kit for kids playset - ENGAGING PRETEND PLAY: Whether played solo or with friends and family, this doctor kit for kids from Kidplokio will have little ones conjuring up cosplay doctor and nurse scenarios for hours on end; treating little scrapes and scratches has never been so fun! - GREAT KIDS TOY FOR TRAVEL: The doctor kit for kids is a great toy to take on the go, whether for family road trips or air travel, as all the toy medical equipment tucks away neatly into the doctors briefcase storage bin for secure storage when not in use! - 7PC KIDS DOCTOR KIT INCLUDES: This awesome pretend play doctor kit for kids includes x1 stethoscope, one needle, one sample dish, a pair of glasses, a microscope, a timer and handy doctors briefcase storage bin to keep all the components together and neatly stored away - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 15 x 4 inches; Color: Blue; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Ages: 3-8 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
